heroHeadline: BREAKING — Iran TV Offers Reward for Missing US Airman; Rubio Strips Soleimani Niece of Residency
heroSubtitle: Iranian state TV broadcast a capture reward for a still-missing US airman on Apr 4 — distinct from the pilot already rescued. Separately, Sec. Rubio revoked US residency of Soleimani's niece. Video confirmed US-Israeli munitions struck an Iranian bridge.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
